name: integration_i_just_made_my_first_sale_httpstrus
method:
I just made my first sale! [https://trustmrr.com/startup/envmanager](https://trustmrr.com/startup/envmanager) for proof!

So I built this tool like 8 months ago. I built a tool for myself. I'm working

phases.name: scrape_proof_patterns
steps: scrape r/buildinpublic for top 'first sale' posts structure
extract common proof formats: TrustMRR, Stripe dashboard, revenue screenshots

phases.name: generate_templates
steps: create 5 build-in-public post templates for PRINTMAXX products
create proof-page generator script (HTML screenshot of Stripe balance)

phases.name: schedule_distribution
steps: queue first build-in-public post to posting_queue
